summary: BCG Platinion's framing of the Dark Software Factory: 3-5x productivity gains, two key competencies (harness engineering, intent thinking), case studies from Spotify/OpenAI/own legacy migrations.
StrongDM Attractor product page describing the graph-of-nodes coding agent and listing ~15 community implementations across Rust/Go/Python/Java/C/Ruby/F#/Scala/TypeScript.
StrongDM CXDB product page: Turn DAG + blob CAS context store with O(1) branching and BLAKE3 dedup.
StrongDM Software Factory products index: CXDB, StrongDM ID, Attractor — the canonical map of the open-sourced component family.
Attractor README: spec-only repo (no code) with three NLSpec markdown files; users feed the spec to Claude Code/Codex/Cursor to regenerate the agent.
CXDB README: full architecture (Rust server + Go client + React UI), binary protocol on 9009, HTTP gateway on 9010, Apache 2.0.
Composio agent-orchestrator README: spawns parallel Claude Code/Codex/Aider/OpenCode agents on git worktrees, autonomously handles CI fixes and PR lifecycle.
Full ~93KB Attractor NLSpec — the canonical natural-language reference all community implementations target for spec compliance.
Anthropic's engineering post on the Claude Agent SDK: agent loop primitives (gather/act/verify), sub-agents, hooks, MCP servers, and the case for harness-quality as the Level 4-to-5 lever.
Cognition's 2025 annual review of Devin: 67% PR merge rate (vs 34%), 4x faster, deployments at Goldman Sachs/Santander/Nubank; honest limits noted (only 15% complex tasks completed without help).

Datadog's argument for harness-first agent design: agent generates, harness verifies, telemetry validates; four interchangeable verification mechanisms (deterministic sim, formal spec, shadow eval, observability).
GitHub announces the Copilot coding agent (asynchronous, autonomous, issue-to-PR) and Agent HQ as a multi-vendor orchestration control plane spanning Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/Cognition/xAI.

OpenHands Software Agent SDK paper (MLSys 2026): redesigned production agent toolkit with sandboxed execution, lifecycle control, model-agnostic routing; SWE-Bench Verified 72% on Sonnet 4.5 extended thinking.

Agentic Harness Engineering arxiv: observability-driven harness evolution lifts Terminal-Bench 2 pass@1 from 69.7% to 77.0%, beating Codex-CLI human-designed harness; transferable across model families.
Willison's link-blog summary of Codex CLI 0.128.0 /goal command — built-in autonomous Ralph-loop equivalent for long-horizon objectives that persist across sessions.
Claude Code sub-agents documentation: each sub-agent has its own context, prompt, tool access, and permissions; description-as-router contract for delegation.
Cline README: 61.2k stars, 5M+ installs; VS Code autonomous coding agent with mandatory human approval per action — the cautious counterpoint to YOLO-style agents.
Roo Code README: Cline fork with Code/Architect/Ask/Debug multi-mode agents; 2026 shutdown of cloud/router announced for May 15 2026 with community fork carrying forward.
OpenHands Software Agent SDK README: production toolkit, MIT license, default agent in a few lines, sandboxed execution, multi-LLM routing; backs MLSys 2026 paper.

Augment Code's 2026 roundup of nine open-source agent orchestrators — agent-orchestrator, Ralphify, IttyBitty, etc. — argues orchestration not generation is the Dark Factory bottleneck above 4-8 concurrent agents.
Cursor's research blog on running hundreds of concurrent agents: flat coordination + locking failed (deadlock, risk-aversion, churn); planner/worker separation with optimistic concurrency works.
Aider's user docs: terminal-first pair programmer with diff-based edits, atomic Git commits, multi-model support — minimal vendor-agnostic CLI used inside loop frameworks.
Augment Code's harness-engineering guide: 42% vs 78% pass-rate spread on the same Claude Opus run with two harness configs; treats harness quality as the primary lever for reliable autonomous coding.

Anthropic's engineering post on evals: eval harness as the verify-loop infrastructure; offline benchmarks vs online telemetry; LLM-as-judge patterns; explicit warning against self-congratulation machines.
Pulumi's Agent Skills post: markdown skill files encode org standards/IaC patterns/policy gates for Claude Code/Cursor/Codex; companion to Pulumi Neo and the dark-factory-for-IaC pattern.
